texto: As far as I'm concerned, Cate Blanchett is a goddess, but she's really down to earth. She's got all those Oscars, she's made all those amazing films and she could spend her whole life doing that, but what does she also do? She gives birth to three boys and creates her own theatre in Sydney.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sylvester McCoy que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “As far as I'm concerned, Cate Blanchett is a goddess, but she's really down to earth. She's got a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, theatre, earth, com foco em termino e theatre.

frase_original: As far as I'm concerned, Cate Blanchett is a goddess, but she's really down to earth. She's got all those Oscars, she's made all those amazing films and she could spend her whole life doing that, but what does she also do? She gives birth to three boys and creates her own theatre in Sydney.
